files.notes: Toolkit-adapted after migration to route Codex agent-rule setup through the generic ai-coding-agent-rules skill plus the n8n-agent-rules skill and optional adapter, while avoiding active nested instruction filenames in skill copies. The local Fast Path now uses Docker Compose with n8n, Postgres, and ngrok as a service; ngrok is the only supported local tunnel path.
Toolkit-adapted after migration to prefer the local Docker Compose stack for updates while preserving explicit public-exposure safety guidance.
Toolkit-adapted to use numbered lists and sub-steps for easier readability.

Wrapper path and console formatting adapted after migration to use an underscore-prefixed entrypoint and clearer colored status output.
Toolkit-adapted after migration to delegate to the current inert .template.md agent-rule generator instead of regenerating retired active-name template docs.
Toolkit-adapted after migration to bind the local ngrok launcher container port to loopback by default while ngrok provides the public tunnel endpoint.
